clayBricks.title: Clay Bricks
clayBricks.description: Premium red clay bricks for all construction needs. Durable, weather-resistant, and available in various sizes.

bcaBlocks.title: BCA Blocks
bcaBlocks.description: Lightweight autoclaved cellular concrete blocks, energy-efficient and easy to work with. Excellent insulation properties.

aggregates.title: Aggregates
aggregates.description: High-quality construction aggregates including sand, gravel, and crushed stone. Perfect for concrete and foundations.
